_meta.note: First real regression pins for the deterministic coordination-mechanism testbed in manuscript/03_results.md. This exemplar explicitly makes a no-speedup / honest-framing claim (clean-metric advantage == 0), so the pins bind that honesty (advantage 0.0, matched-budget efficiency 16 / 36 re-probes) and the load-bearing robustness benefit (confirmation noise-inflation via full-precision reported metrics). arXiv:2605.28655 primitives.

comparison_coordinated_experiments_to_op.reason: Experiment index at which the coordinated three-team run first reaches the clean ground-truth optimum, under the matched 60-experiment budget. Re-derived from src, not copied from the manuscript.

comparison_baseline_redundant_reprobes.reason: Redundant re-probes of already-retired directions spent by the single-thread baseline (no dead-end registry) across the full 60-experiment budget. This is the efficiency-headline count in the comparison table.

comparison_clean_metric_advantage.reason: The honest no-speedup headline: clean(coordinated) - clean(baseline). Both configurations reach the same clean optimum, so this is exactly 0.0. Re-derived via objective.clean on both champions.

ablation_full_coordination_reported_metr.reason: Full-precision reported (noisy) champion metric of the full coordinated configuration in the ablation table (manuscript displays 0.00121). Catches sub-display drift.

ablation_no_confirmation_reported_metric.reason: Full-precision reported champion metric when noise-band confirmation is switched off (manuscript displays 0.01565). Removing confirmation inflates accepted noise ~13x (0.01565 vs 0.00121) while the clean metric stays 0.0 — the load-bearing robustness claim.

comparison_coordinated_experiments_to_op.claim_text: Coordinated teams | 0.0012 | 0.0000 | 16 | 36 | 0 ... the coordinated run gets there at experiment 16 versus the baseline's 12

comparison_baseline_redundant_reprobes.claim_text: Single-thread baseline | 0.0012 | 0.0000 | 12 | 60 | 36 ... spends the full budget and wastes 36 experiments re-testing directions already known to fail.

comparison_clean_metric_advantage.claim_text: the clean-metric advantage of coordination over the baseline is exactly 0.0000 ... advantage = 0.0000

ablation_no_confirmation_reported_metric.claim_text: No confirmation | 0.01565 | 0.0000 | 0.01565 | 36 | 0 ... inflates the reported metric from 0.00121 to 0.01565 — a roughly 13x increase in accepted noise.
